slides.title: Safe Sharing
slides.text: In challenging, sensitive moments, and even changes like moving house - Tzipur gives you a safe space to share what's happening. No judgment. No shame. Just you.

slides.title: Tzipur turns it into a story
slides.text: With the help of AI, your sharing turns into a metaphorical story, tailored exactly to your child's age and emotional world.

slides.title: Read together and connect
slides.text: You and your child read the story together - a moment of mutual understanding that strengthens the bond between you.

landing.title: Turning moments of difficulty
landing.subtitle:
Into a connecting family story.
Ready to discover your story?

auth.title: Login & Registration
auth.explainer: A personal account allows you to save your stories and read them again whenever you want. Additionally, you can enter general details about your children and receive richer, more personalized stories.

creation.title: What happened today?
creation.subtitle: Choose an option or tell in your own words.
creation.freeText: You can also write here in a few words...

loader.notification: Your story is ready! Click here to review
sentences: We sent a dove with your message... it's already returning

preview.title: Story Review
preview.instruction: Please review each chapter and request edits if necessary
preview.editLabel: Something in the chapter feels off? Request edits
preview.editPlaceholder: For example, soften the tone, or use our nicknames for the characters
preview.warningMessage: We noticed you wrote edit requests. If you continue to story generation now, the notes will not be sent.

end.title: The End...
end.subtitle: We hope you enjoyed the story!

shareBanner.title: Came to share an experience?
shareBanner.subtitle: Click here to create a shared story

error.title: Oops, something went wrong...
error.message: It seems an unexpected error occurred. We apologize for the inconvenience.
